adrenaline orb: The Pokémon with more % max HP attacks first (ties → speed)
air balloon: Flying Pokémon can dodge incoming attacks (more often the faster they are)
aspear berry: When your Pokémon heals, it gets a random stat boost per 50 HP healed
babiri berry: Your Pokémon take 10% less damage per Steel type on your team (max 40%)
big mushroom: When a Grass Pokémon heals, deal that much damage to all enemy Pokémon
big root: Your Pokémon heal 20% of all damage inflicted on enemy Pokémon
binding band: Party slot 1 gains 50% of your team's total HP — but if it faints, the fight is over
black glasses: +40% Dark move damage; attempts Dark-type attacks if able
black sludge: When an enemy faints, your active Pokémon gets 3 random stat boosts
body plate: Normal Pokémon deal an extra 5% of their max HP on hit
bright powder: Normal Pokémon get 10% of HP as DEF & Sp.DEF
casteliacone: On-hit effects against enemies trigger twice
cell battery: At fight start, the first Electric Pokémon in your team makes one bonus attack
charcoal: +40% Fire move damage; attempts Fire-type attacks if able
charti berry: When your Pokémon reaches +10 DEF and +10 Sp.DEF, it also gains +10 Speed, ATK and Sp.ATK
chilan berry: When an Ice Pokémon defeats an enemy, 50% chance the enemy's next Pokémon enters frozen
chople berry: When a Fighting Pokémon defeats an enemy, all fainted Fighting Pokémon revive at 1 HP (the first becomes active)
cleanse tag: +10% damage per level your Pokémon has over the target
coba berry: Your Pokémon deal +10% damage per positive Speed stage they have
colbur berry: +10% crit chance. Your Pokémon gain dodge chance equal to half their crit chance
comet shard: On pickup: replace your team with random Pokémon 10 levels higher (not added to Pokédex or Hall of Fame)
custap berry: When a Rock Pokémon faints, it explodes — dealing 25% of its move's damage to every enemy
damp rock: +10% damage per negative stat stage on the enemy
dark stone: Excessive damage from Dark Pokémon splashes to the next enemy
destiny knot: When a Pokémon gains ATK / Sp.ATK, the active enemy loses the same amount
draco plate: The first Dragon attack each combat strikes twice
dragon fang: +40% Dragon move damage; attempts Dragon-type attacks if able
dragon scale: The first Dragon Pokémon to faint triggers the Dragon trait
dread plate: When Ghost executes a target, all other enemies get two random stat nerfs
earth plate: Ground Pokémon use their DEF in place of Sp.DEF when attacked
eject button: When the enemy active faints, 50% of its negative stat stages carry to the next
eject pack: Damage your active Pokémon takes is spread across your whole team
electirizer: When an Electric Pokémon attacks, it gains +1 Speed for the rest of the run
electric seed: Electric Pokémon trigger on-attack traits and items twice
everstone: When a Rock Pokémon faints, it spreads its DEF and Sp.DEF stages across its team
eviolite: stops evolutions, if the pokemon is not the final stage it gets +50% DEF & +50% Sp. DEF
fist plate: When a Fighting Pokémon KOs an enemy, it triggers the Fighting trait
flame plate: Fire Pokémon benefit +50% from ATK / Sp.ATK stages
float stone: If you're faster: on-hit deal % bonus damage that scales with the % Speed gap
focus band: When your Pokémon faints, your Fighting Pokémon get +1 Speed
focus sash: Each Pokémon survives a KO once per fight with 1 HP
grassy seed: At fight start, Grass Pokémon gain +100% max HP but begin at 50% HP
haban berry: When a Dragon Pokémon defeats an enemy, it gains +2 Speed
hard stone: +40% Rock move damage; attempts Rock-type attacks if able
hazard lens: Your non-attack damage (splash, poison) deals 30% more
heat rock: Fire Pokémon share half their ATK / Sp.ATK boosts with their party
houndoominite: Mega Stone — turns the holder into Mega Houndoom while held
hp up: When your Pokémon defeats an enemy, it gains +2 max HP for the rest of the run
icy rock: After a shatter, re-freeze the target at the trait's freeze chance
insect plate: When a Bug Pokémon crits, it gains +20 levels for the rest of the combat
iron ball: Enemies deal 10% less damage for each Speed stage they are missing
iron plate: Your Pokémon take 50% less damage if they are slower than the attacker
iron thorns: Enemy Pokémon take 20% of their attack as recoil
kasib berry: After a Ghost Pokémon defeats an enemy, it has a 50% chance to dodge the next attack
kebia berry: Your Pokémon take 5% less damage per stack of poison on the enemy (max 60%)
king s rock: 30% chance to flinch the target on a hit
lagging tail: Always moves last, but +100% move damage
lead sparkle: At the start of combat, your first Pokémon becomes shiny (counts +1 for traits)
leaf stone: Grass Pokémon deal 10% of enemy max HP and heal the same each turn
legend aegis: Your Pokémon take 10% less damage for each legendary on your team
legend lure: From now on, every catch node is a legendary catch node
legend might: Your Pokémon deal +20% damage for each legendary on your team
legend s call: On pickup, replace your team with random non-shiny legendaries (not added to Pokédex or Hall of Fame)
life orb: Your Pokémon deal 50% more damage and take 50% more damage
light clay: Your Pokémon deal +5% damage for each different type on your team
lucky egg: 30% chance: holder gains +1 extra level after each battle
lucky punch: On KO: Normal Pokémon gain +10% max HP (for this fight) and full-heal
lum berry: Your Pokémon get two random stat boosts at fight start. Their stat stages are uncapped
luminous moss: When a Water Pokémon is hit, it triggers the Water trait on the attacker
macho brace: Your Pokémon deal half damage but attack twice
magmarizer: When a Fire Pokémon faints, half its current ATK / Sp.ATK buffs pass to a random Fire ally
magnet: +40% Electric move damage; attempts Electric-type attacks if able
metal alloy: When a Steel Pokémon is attacked, it gains +1 DEF and +1 Sp.DEF
metal coat: +40% Steel move damage; attempts Steel-type attacks if able
metal powder: Your Pokémon are 10% faster per positive Sp.DEF stage
metronome: Dual-type holder uses its OTHER type for attacks; +20% damage on all moves
miracle seed: +40% Grass move damage; attempts Grass-type attacks if able
mirror herb: When you debuff the enemy active, your active gains the same stat stage
misty seed: At combat start, all your Fairy Pokémon fire one 10%-power attack
moon stone: Force evolves a Pokémon regardless of level USABLE
muscle band: +10% crit chance. On crit: +1 Speed and +1 ATK / Sp.ATK
mystic water: Your active Water Pokémon gains DOUBLE the ATK / Sp.ATK stages the enemy active loses
occa berry: Fire Pokémon gain +2 ATK and +2 Sp.ATK at the start of the fight
oran berry: +10% crit chance. Heal 100% of damage inflicted on critical hits
pecha berry: Your Poison Pokémon heal 2× the damage dealt by poison ticks
pink bow: A Fairy Pokémon's attack has a 30% chance to attract (flinch) the target
pixie plate: +40% Fairy move damage; attempts Fairy-type attacks if able
power lens: Your stat boosts are 30% more effective
pretty feather: When a Flying Pokémon faints, the whole party gets +2 Speed
pretty wing: Your Pokémon deal 50% less damage and take 50% less damage
protective pads: A Fighting Pokémon survives a KO at 1 HP once per fight (triggers the Fighting trait)
protector: Your Pokémon deal +10% damage per positive DEF stage
pure incense: +10% damage per held- slot left empty on your team
quick claw: Your Pokémon gain +1 Speed stage at the start of combat
quick powder: The first Pokémon in your party gets +2 Speed (stage)
razor claw: +35% crit chance. Crit chance above 100% becomes crit damage
razor fang: +10% crit chance. Crits have a 50% chance to flinch the opponent
reaper cloth: Once per fight, when a Ghost Pokémon faints, the enemy active Pokémon gets executed
red card: Take 50% less damage from super-effective hits
resonance: Legendary Pokémon count twice for traits
revival herb: Your Pokémon can't heal during combat, but fainted teammates start each fight at 1 HP
ring target: All moves are neutrally effective (yours and the enemy's)
rock incense: Rock Pokémon benefit +50% from DEF & Sp.DEF stages
rocky helmet: Attacker takes 12% of their max HP on each hit
roseli berry: Fairy Pokémon gain the lowered stats of Pokémon they defeat
sacred ash: Fully restores HP and revives a Pokémon (works on fainted or alive) USABLE
sea incense: Water trait also lowers the enemy's DEF & Sp.DEF
sharp beak: +40% Flying move damage; attempts Flying-type attacks if able
shed shell: Bug Pokémon attacks reduce the enemy's level by 5 for the fight
shiny guard: Your Pokémon take 10% less damage for each shiny on your team
shiny power: Your Pokémon deal +10% damage for each shiny on your team
shoal salt: Normal Pokémon heal 10% max HP each turn
shuca berry: Enemy Pokémon lose 1 Speed stage when attacked
silk scarf: +40% Normal move damage; attempts Normal-type attacks if able
silver powder: When a Bug Pokémon levels up, 30% chance to level up again
sitrus berry: All healing on your Pokémon is doubled
sky plate: Flying Pokémon deal bonus damage based on how much faster they are (up to +50%)
smoke ball: Enemy Pokémon take +50% damage from non-attack sources (splash / poison / hazards)
smooth rock: When a Ground Pokémon defeats an enemy, it gains random stat boosts equal to twice the enemy's missing Speed stages
soft sand: +40% Ground move damage; attempts Ground-type attacks if able
soothe bell: Start-of-fight traits and effects trigger twice
spell tag: +40% Ghost move damage; attempts Ghost-type attacks if able
spooky plate: Ghost Pokémon heal equal to execution damage
star piece: After every boss, replace your team with random Pokémon. They count as +1 for traits (not added to Pokédex or Hall of Fame).
stardust: Your Pokémon have a 10% chance to level up after each combat
stealth goggles: Dark Pokémon gain crit chance equal to two-thirds of their level (%)
sticky barb: Pokémon you hit get a random stat nerf after every attack
tanga berry: When a Bug Pokémon faints, your other Bug Pokémon each gain 20% of its level for the combat
tiny mushroom: Grass Pokémon use Spore instead of attacking (puts enemy to sleep, 50% wake / turn)
tm: Upgrades a Pokémon's move tier by 1 USABLE
toxic orb: When a poisoned Pokémon faints, half its stacks pass to the next
toxic plate: When a Poison Pokémon hits a poisoned target, stacks are doubled
twisted spoon: +40% Psychic move damage; attempts Psychic-type attacks if able
wacan berry: When an Electric Pokémon attacks, 20% chance to paralyze the enemy (skips its next turn)
yache berry: Pokémon get a random stat boost after every attack (max 6 per fight)
